docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MYERS, ELIZABETH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2012 - CONTINUED TO NOV-29-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL QUIGLEY--MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,353.11 FILED BY WHEELCARE EXPRESS AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WHEELCARE EXPRESS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($135.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED SEP-07-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, ELIZABETH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHEELCARE EXPRESS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSEN. FILED BY WHEELCARE EXPRESS MYERS, ELIZABETH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHEELCARE EXPRESS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYERS, ELIZABETH $3,353.11 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,538.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2012 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
